company: Underdog.io -Apply to top tech jobs in 60 seconds. A place where companies apply to you
strengths: Strong hands-on with BigQuery, dbt, Airflow
Proven SQL and Python ETL experience
Implemented data quality with Great Expectations
CI/CD and automation via GitHub Actions
weaknesses: Limited explicit experience with unstructured data
No listed experience with vector stores or embeddings
No explicit feature store or retrieval layer experience
Under 6 years of data engineering experience
improvement_bullets: Developed ELT pipelines to ingest unstructured JSON data from REST APIs, transforming raw records into structured feature sets for downstream consumption.
Built and maintained retrieval-ready data structures, including embeddings for semantic search, to support AI-driven feature development and predictive modeling.
Architected production data layers to support AI/ML workloads, ensuring data quality and observability standards were maintained for downstream agentic integrations.
Designed and implemented retrieval-layer logic within data pipelines to surface real-time insights, directly powering AI-based matching engines.
Collaborated on feature store development by consolidating normalized data attributes, enabling consistent data retrieval for machine learning and operational intelligence.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with the hiring partner of Underdog.io. I am interested in this opportunity because of the company's commitment to modernizing the $1 trillion franchise ecosystem through agentic AI. What interests me about working with your team is its approach to building a foundational data layer that acts as a competitive moat; I am inspired by the vision of creating an AI-native platform that empowers local business operators. I believe my expertise in building scalable ELT pipelines and my proficiency in modern data stack technologies like dbt and BigQuery would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached complex data challenges with a focus on reliability and automation. In fact, while building a production-grade ELT pipeline for FRED economic data, I utilized Python, Airflow, and dbt to create a star-schema model that significantly reduced analyst query time. This experience resulted in a robust, CI/CD-integrated data warehouse that delivers trusted, clean insights, directly mirroring the need for high-quality, AI-ready data in your franchise platform. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role would allow me to bring my deep experience in data quality and observability to your core product’s data architecture. Additionally, my role as a Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my skills in translating user feedback into production code. By collaborating with stakeholders to align software features with business objectives, I helped drive a 15% increase in feature adoption, demonstrating my ability to build data-centric features end-to-end. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in ETL and data modeling to help build the next generation of AI-powered matching engines at your company. I know that my technical versatility and focus on data integrity align with what it takes to succeed as a Data Engineer on your team. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
